title: Skapanthus oreophilus
taxonomy: Skapanthus oreophilus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae, within the genus Skapanthus. This plant is native to certain parts of Asia. The family Asparagaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that also includes lilies, hyacinths, and agaves.
